belier.intro: The Moon has shifted into steady Taurus at 23 degrees, settling into your second house as the waning crescent thins to 21 percent illumination. This is a house of value and resource, and the grounded Taurus light asks you to take stock of what you actually own, earn, and deserve rather than what you merely want. Neptune retrograde continues its slow dissolve in your own sign, quietly separating your true desires from borrowed ones.
belier.love: Affection expressed through practical gestures, a meal made with care, a bill quietly paid, lands more deeply today than grand declarations. Let the Taurus Moon teach you that steadiness can be its own kind of passion.
belier.work: Money conversations and budget reviews benefit from this earthy, patient lunar mood. Resist the urge to rush a negotiation; the waning light rewards those who wait for the right moment rather than force one.
belier.energy: Your fire banks low and warm rather than roaring, a coal-bed of energy suited to sustained effort over sprints. Physical grounding, walking barefoot, eating slowly, helps you meet this Taurus Moon on its own terms.
belier.intuition: A quiet certainty about your own worth is forming beneath the surface, unhurried by Neptune's retrograde fog. Trust the plain, unglamorous knowing rather than waiting for a dramatic sign.
belier.mantra: I know my own worth without needing to prove it.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon comes home to your own sign today, sitting at 23 degrees Taurus in your first house, and the waning crescent light at 21 percent makes this a rare moment where the sky itself mirrors your native steadiness. The Cancer Sun warms your third house, favoring honest conversation, while Mercury retrograde in Cancer asks you to choose your words with unusual care this week. This is a day to simply be yourself, without apology or adjustment.
taureau.love: Your own emotional needs deserve center stage today, and naming them plainly serves you better than hinting. A partner responds well to your natural steadiness when you let it show without softening it for their comfort.
taureau.work: Trust your instincts about pacing today; the Taurus Moon in your first house supports doing things your own way rather than someone else's timeline. Mercury retrograde means a written agreement deserves a second read before you sign it.
taureau.energy: This is your most naturally energized day of the stretch, earth meeting earth, self meeting self. Move at the deliberate pace that suits you and do not let anyone rush what does not need rushing.
taureau.intuition: Self-knowledge is unusually accessible today; the answers you seek about your own direction are closer to the surface than usual. A body sensation, a simple felt preference, is more reliable than any external opinion.
taureau.mantra: I trust my own steady pace over anyone else's rush.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon is still in Aries territory by feel but has begun edging toward your own sign, though today it remains at 23 degrees Taurus in your twelfth house, the quietest room in the zodiac's floor plan. The waning crescent at 21 percent illumination deepens this withdrawal further, asking you to rest before your ruler Mercury's retrograde loop in Cancer pulls your attention toward hidden feelings. Let this be a day of low visibility and high inner honesty.
gemeaux.love: Unspoken tenderness matters more than conversation today. If words feel hard to summon under this twelfth house Moon, a quiet gesture or simply staying near someone communicates just as much.
gemeaux.work: Behind-the-scenes tasks, clearing old files, finishing what has lingered half-done, suit this Taurus Moon far better than anything requiring performance or visibility. Save the big pitch for another day.
gemeaux.energy: Your usual mental restlessness quiets under this earthy, hidden placement. Let yourself be still; the fatigue you may feel is not weakness but a genuine call for rest before the New Moon ahead.
gemeaux.intuition: Dreams and half-formed thoughts carry real information right now, more than any conversation could. Keep a notebook close and write down what surfaces before the busy day erases it.
gemeaux.mantra: I rest in the quiet and trust what it reveals.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon sits at 23 degrees Taurus in your eleventh house of friendship and hope, waning to 21 percent light, while your own Sun advances to 17 degrees of your sign. Mercury retrograde continues moving through Cancer itself, your own territory, so misunderstandings among friends or in group chats deserve patience rather than a quick reply. This is a stretch for reviewing which communities truly nourish you.
cancer.love: A friend's perspective on your relationship may land differently than intended this week, thanks to Mercury's retrograde static. Ask for clarification before assuming the worst; the message is often more caring than it first appears.
cancer.work: Group projects benefit from written summaries rather than rapid back-and-forth, since Mercury retrograde in your sign scrambles tone more than usual. Slow down your replies and reread before sending.
cancer.energy: The waning Taurus Moon asks for grounded, unhurried recovery this week, quiet evenings over busy ones. Your emotional tank refills fastest through simple, repeated comforts rather than novelty.
cancer.intuition: You sense correctly when a group dynamic has shifted, even if Mercury retrograde muddies the explanation. Trust the feeling first and let the details clarify themselves in the coming days.
cancer.mantra: I trust my feelings even when the words are still unclear.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon rests at 23 degrees Taurus in your tenth house of career and reputation, its light waning to 21 percent as the Cancer Sun continues warming your twelfth house of retreat. This pairing asks something unusual of you: to tend your public standing quietly, through steady competence rather than performance. Let your work speak without needing an audience today.
lion.love: Private reassurance means more than public displays right now. A partner who sees your effort even when no one is applauding deserves your trust and your gratitude in equal measure.
lion.work: Reputation is built today through reliability rather than spectacle. A task completed without fanfare under this grounded Taurus Moon earns more long-term respect than one performed for an audience.
lion.energy: Your usual radiance turns inward, a banked fire rather than a blaze. Honor the need for quiet recovery even if it feels unlike you; the New Moon ahead will ask for renewed brightness soon enough.
lion.intuition: A quiet hunch about your career direction, one that has nothing to do with applause, deserves your attention. What you sense in private about your path is more trustworthy than any external validation right now.
lion.mantra: I let my quiet competence speak for itself.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon holds steady at 23 degrees Taurus in your ninth house of belief and distant horizons, waning toward 21 percent light as your ruler Mercury moves retrograde through Cancer, a fellow water sign shaping your tenth house of career. Expect old philosophies or travel plans to resurface for reconsideration rather than new ones to appear. The earth Moon here supports patient, practical reflection on what you actually believe.
vierge.love: A difference in worldview with a partner, whether about lifestyle, values, or long-term plans, benefits from calm discussion rather than debate. The Taurus Moon favors finding common practical ground over winning the argument.
vierge.work: Mercury retrograde in your career house means a paused project or a revisited proposal may reappear this week; treat it as useful feedback rather than a setback. Review contracts twice before signing anything new.
vierge.energy: Grounded, methodical effort suits you today far more than ambitious leaps. Trust the plodding, careful pace; it is your natural strength, not a limitation, under this Taurus sky.
vierge.intuition: A belief you have held for years may quietly loosen its grip today, and that loosening is worth noticing rather than resisting. Practical instinct, not abstract theory, guides you most reliably now.
vierge.mantra: I hold my beliefs loosely enough to let them grow.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon at 23 degrees Taurus moves through your eighth house of shared resources and deep transformation, its light waning to 21 percent as the Cancer Sun anchors your tenth house of public life. This combination asks you to quietly examine what you owe and are owed, financially and emotionally, before stepping back into visibility. Patience with complexity serves you better than quick resolution today.
balance.love: Intimacy deepens through practical honesty about shared resources or unspoken emotional debts. The Taurus Moon favors steady, grounded conversation over dramatic confession; say the plain truth and let it land.
balance.work: A financial or contractual matter tied to your public role deserves careful, unrushed review. Neither Neptune nor Pluto's retrogrades are pointed at you directly, but the general fog of the season still favors caution before signing.
balance.energy: Your usual social energy turns private and conserving today. Rest is productive, not wasted time, especially with a New Moon approaching later this week that will ask more of you.
balance.intuition: You sense clearly when a shared arrangement is imbalanced, even if you cannot yet name why. Give that quiet discomfort room to clarify itself rather than forcing a premature explanation.
balance.mantra: I trust the quiet signal beneath the surface.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon sits at 23 degrees Taurus directly opposite your sign, activating your seventh house of partnership, while the waning crescent thins to 21 percent light. This is a day for honest reckoning with a close relationship, business or romantic, without the intensity you usually bring to such reckonings. The Cancer Sun in your ninth house adds a philosophical undertone, inviting you to ask what this partnership actually means to you.
scorpion.love: A partner's steady, perhaps slower, way of showing care deserves recognition today rather than impatience. The Taurus Moon teaches that consistency can be its own form of devotion, even without intensity.
scorpion.work: Negotiations and collaborations benefit from a calmer, more grounded tone than your usual directness. State your position plainly and let the other side respond in their own time.
scorpion.energy: Your depth turns contemplative rather than probing today, a quieter form of your usual intensity. Use this lull to recover strength before the New Moon stirs things again later this week.
scorpion.intuition: You read a partner's true intentions with unusual clarity today, cutting through any surface pleasantries. Trust what you sense about their consistency, or lack of it, over what they say.
scorpion.mantra: I honor steadiness as a form of loyalty.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon at 23 degrees Taurus moves through your sixth house of daily routine and wellbeing, its waning light at 21 percent favoring quiet maintenance over grand reinvention. The Cancer Sun in your eighth house adds emotional weight to questions of shared resources, but today the practical matters most: sleep, food, the small habits that keep your fire burning steadily. Jupiter's usual expansiveness takes a back seat to earthly upkeep.
sagittaire.love: Small daily acts of care, checking in, remembering a preference, mean more than grand romantic statements this week. Let the Taurus Moon remind you that devotion often looks unremarkable up close.
sagittaire.work: Routine tasks and health-related adjustments deserve your attention more than new ventures today. A habit tweaked now, eating on a schedule, moving your body daily, pays dividends once the New Moon arrives.
sagittaire.energy: Your usual restlessness settles into something more sustainable under this earthy Moon. Let yourself enjoy a slower rhythm; expansion will return soon enough, but today calls for maintenance.
sagittaire.intuition: Your body is communicating clearly about what serves it and what does not. A recurring physical signal, fatigue after a certain food, tension after a certain routine, deserves honest attention now.
sagittaire.mantra: I tend the small things that keep my fire steady.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon rests at 23 degrees Taurus in your fifth house of creativity and romance, the waning crescent dimming to 21 percent as it favors quiet artistic tending over bold new projects. The Cancer Sun in your seventh house continues to hold up a mirror through your closest partnerships, asking for grounded honesty rather than performance. This is a day to create for yourself rather than for an audience.
capricorne.love: Romantic gestures rooted in simplicity, a shared meal, unhurried time together, land better than anything elaborate today. Let a partner see the parts of you that are still playful beneath your usual discipline.
capricorne.work: A creative or self-expressive project benefits from patient refinement rather than a fresh start. The Taurus Moon rewards craftsmanship; slow, careful improvement outperforms ambition today.
capricorne.energy: Your earth element finds real comfort under this Taurus Moon, a rare alignment of temperament and sky. Use it to enjoy simple pleasures rather than pushing toward the next achievement.
capricorne.intuition: A creative impulse that feels almost too simple to matter is worth following anyway. Trust the plain, unglamorous idea over the elaborate one; it likely holds more truth than you expect.
capricorne.mantra: I create simply and let the simplicity be enough.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon at 23 degrees Taurus moves through your fourth house of home and family, its waning light at 21 percent illumination asking for domestic quiet rather than activity. Pluto's retrograde continues its long, slow work in your own sign, restructuring how you relate to your inner foundations, while Neptune retrograde in Aries adds a dreamlike quality to your ninth house of belief. Let home be the container for whatever restructuring is happening inside you.
verseau.love: A quiet evening at home communicates more devotion right now than any outing could. Let a partner see the version of you that exists away from ideas and community, simply present in domestic life.
verseau.work: Remote or home-based work flows more easily today than anything requiring public performance. Use the grounded Taurus Moon to organize your physical space; a tidier environment eases the internal restructuring Pluto is asking of you.
verseau.energy: Your usual mental energy turns homeward and physical today. Tend to your living space, your body, your immediate surroundings, and let abstraction wait for another day.
verseau.intuition: Old family patterns surface for review under this fourth house Moon, offering insight into structures Pluto has been slowly dismantling within you. What you inherited without choosing it deserves honest examination now.
verseau.mantra: I let my foundations rebuild themselves at their own pace.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon at 23 degrees Taurus settles into your third house of communication and daily connection, its waning crescent light at 21 percent favoring careful, unhurried words over quick exchanges. Neptune retrograde continues moving through your twelfth house by rulership resonance, deepening dreams and inner symbols even as the practical Taurus Moon asks you to handle everyday correspondence with patience. A short walk or a written note may say more than a long conversation today.
poissons.love: Simple, honest words exchanged without urgency serve a relationship well today. Let the Taurus Moon slow your usual emotional intensity into something steadier and easier for a partner to receive.
poissons.work: Local errands, emails, and small daily tasks benefit from a grounded, methodical pace rather than being rushed through. Mercury retrograde elsewhere in the sky is a reminder to reread anything important before sending it.
poissons.energy: Your usual watery sensitivity finds welcome ballast in this earthy Moon. Let practical, repetitive tasks calm your nervous system rather than seeking escape from them.
poissons.intuition: A passing comment or small daily detail carries more meaning than it first appears to. Pay attention to what a sibling, neighbor, or casual acquaintance says today; it may answer a question you have been quietly holding.
poissons.mantra: I find calm in the small, steady exchanges of my day.
poissons.author: Sibylle
